ogTitle: Caringbah South vs Carlingford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caringbah South and Carlingford.
heading: Caringbah South vs Carlingford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caringbah South, New South Wales and Carlingford, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caringbah South and Carlingford have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Caringbah South or Carlingford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caringbah South has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Carlingford scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caringbah South scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Carlingford scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caringbah South or Carlingford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caringbah South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
